    T

    tablePileSize() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Deck
    Returns the number of cards currently on the table pile.
    toString() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.exceptions.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns a formatted string summarising the illegal play context.
    toString() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Card
    Returns a human-readable representation of this card, e.g.
    toString() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameState
    Returns a multi-line debug summary of this snapshot.
    toString() - Method in exception class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.InvalidCardPlayException
    Returns a formatted string summarising the illegal play context.
    toString() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.Player
    Returns a display-friendly description of this player's state.
    toString() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.PlayerHand
    Returns a display string listing all cards in this hand.
    TurnManager - Class in com.example.elcincuentazo.model
    Manages turn progression and concurrency for the Cincuentazo game.
    TurnManager(GameLogic) - Constructor for class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.TurnManager
    Constructs a new TurnManager wired to the given game logic.
